title: Spanish Almond Pilaf
description: A flavorful Spanish-inspired side dish made with almonds, pilaf, and a hint of citrus.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced almonds and cook, stirring frequently, until lightly toasted and fragrant, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the cooked pilaf to the skillet and stir to combine with the almonds.
Season with flaky sea salt and stir to combine.
Stir in the lemon zest and juice.
Transfer the pilaf mixture to a serving dish and garnish with chopped parsley.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
